description_long: This motorcycle features a sporty, naked street bike design with a prominent fuel tank, exposed frame, and minimal fairings. The body is primarily black with a white fuel tank and gold-colored front forks and wheels, giving it a striking, modern appearance. The seat is designed for two riders, with a slightly raised pillion section and a compact tail section that includes integrated rear lights and turn signals. The front end is equipped with a clear windscreen, dual mirrors, and a headlight assembly, while the handlebars are upright for comfortable urban riding. The exhaust system is visible on the right side, running low and ending in a black muffler. The overall build suggests a high-performance, agile motorcycle suitable for city commuting and spirited riding.
description: A modern, sporty naked motorcycle with a white tank, black body, and gold wheels, featuring upright handlebars and minimal fairings. It has a compact, aggressive design ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, windscreen, upright handlebars, mirrors, and gold front forks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white fuel tank, black seat, gold wheels, and exposed engine components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, turn signals, rear tire, and the seat's stepped design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, engine, gold wheels, and the overall streamlined profile.
